lesson: HTR FAIL after a refill, with the log showing a lid-open event and the latch not fully clicked, means the lid aborted the cycle. Latch it before re-running, or it just fails again.
symptoms: Machine locked out, HTR FAIL on display.
Last visit was a full clean and refill.
Night manager says everything was fine at close.

tests.error-log: Heat-treat cycle aborted overnight — a hopper lid-open event logged mid-cycle. Pasteurisation incomplete.
tests.temp-probe: Mix and barrel temps in spec right now. The heater gets warm when commanded.
tests.inspect-beater: The hopper lid has seen better days — worn fittings, tired seal face. Hard to say if it's making clean contact all round.

flavour: Clicked the lid. Re-ran the cycle. Sent the invoice.
authenticityNote: A lid left slightly open from a refill aborts the overnight heat-treat cycle and locks the machine. Superficially identical to heat-treat-cycle-failed, but re-running without closing the lid just fails again — inspect the latch first.
